mapper.select:
SELECT TAG FROM TB_WPP_TAG_INF WHERE USE_YN = '1'
AND TAG_GRP = #{tag_grp}
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO
TB_RAWDATA
TB_RAWDATA_HOUR
TB_RAWDATA_15MIN
TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT
( ts, tagname, value, quality, server ) VALUES ( #{timestamp}, #{tagname}, #{value}, #{quality}, #{server} )
INSERT INTO TB_BASE_SAVINGS_TARGET VALUES (#{type}, #{mnth}, #{value}, #{unit}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VALUE = #{value}

INSERT INTO TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET VALUES (#{date}, #{type}, #{savingCo2}, #{savingCost}, #{savingKwh}, #{savingUnit}, #{nowGoal}, #{allElecValue}, #{nowFrq}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE SAVINGCOST = #{savingCost}, SAVINGKWH = #{savingKwh}, SAVINGCO2 = #{savingCo2}, SAVINGUNIT = #{savingUnit}, NOW_GOAL = #{nowGoal}, NOW_PWR = #{allElecValue}, NOW_FRQ = #{nowFrq}
mapper.select: SELECT TAG_NAME, TAG_DSC as TAG_DCS, TAG_UNIT, TAG_UNIT_VALUE FROM TB_TAG_UNIT_INFO WHERE TAG_TYP=#{tag_typ}
SELECT FUNC_TYP, DISPLAY_NM, TAG, TAG_KOR_NM, TAG_UNIT, TAG_DSC as TAG_DCS, DEFAULT_VALUE FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP=#{func_typ}

SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(rd.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),0),2) as value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND pti.IS_ALL='1'
AND rd.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
AND rd.ts BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(#{date})
AND rd.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-01-01 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-12-31 23:59:59')

SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(rd.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE),0),2) as value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND pti.IS_ALL='1'
AND rd.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
AND rd.ts BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(#{date})
AND rd.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-01-01 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-12-31 23:59:59')

select rtr.ANLY_DATE, rtr.DATA_BS_YMNTH, rtr.RATE_IDX, rtr.DATA_MSN_PRCNT, FORMAT (rtr.TOT_PWR,0) TOT_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.TOT_FEE,0) TOT_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.BASE_FEE,0) BASE_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.ETC_FEE,0) ETC_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.L_PWR,0) L_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.M_PWR,0) M_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.H_PWR,0) H_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.L_ELCTR_FEE,0) L_ELCTR_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.M_ELCTR_FEE,0) M_ELCTR_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.H_ELCTR_FEE,0) H_ELCTR_FEE, rtr.DC_NMB, DATE_FORMAT(rtr.RGSTR_TIME,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as RGSTR_TIME, rtr.FLAG, rmi.LARGE_CTGRY, rmi.MIDDLE_CTGRY, rmi.SMALL_CTGRY, FORMAT (rpr.PWR,0) PWR from TB_RT_RATE_RST rtr, TB_RT_MSTR_INF rmi, TB_RT_POWER_RST rpr where rtr.rate_idx = rmi.rate_idx AND rtr.DATA_BS_YMNTH = rpr.DATA_BS_YMNTH AND rtr.ANLY_DATE = rpr.ANLY_DATE AND rmi.USE_YN = '1'
AND rtr.ANLY_DATE = (SELECT MAX(ANLY_DATE) ANLY FROM TB_RT_RATE_RST WHERE DATA_BS_YMNTH = #{ymnth}) and rtr.DATA_BS_YMNTH=#{ymnth}

select FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(rdhi.value), 0) , 4) value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdhi WHERE rdhi.tagname in ( SELECT DISTINCT(FRQ_TAG) FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF WHERE USE_YN = 1 )
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(#{date})
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-01-01 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-12-31 23:59:59')
SELECT PUMP_GRP, PUMP_GRP_NM, FRI_TAG, PRI_T_TAG, COUNT(PUMP_GRP_IDX) as GRP_COUNT FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF GROUP BY PUMP_GRP

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ts, tagname, value, quality FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR WHERE ts >= DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND ts <= #{date} and tagname in (select TAG from TB_WPP_TAG_INF where USE_YN='1' and TAG_GRP in ('PWQ', 'FRQ', 'PWI', 'VOI', 'SWI') )
select FUNC_TYP, TAG from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where TAG_GRP = 'EMS' and DISPLAY_ID = 'ConsumerTag'
mapper.update: update TB_WPP_TAG_CODE set DEFAULT_VALUE = #{statusValue} where TAG_GRP = 'EMS' and TAG_DSC = 'emerStatus' and TAG_UNIT = #{pump_grp}
mapper.select: select FUNC_TYP, TAG, TAG_KOR_NM from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where TAG_GRP = 'EMS'
SELECT FUNC_TYP, DISPLAY_NM, TAG, TAG_KOR_NM, TAG_UNIT, TAG_DSC as TAG_DCS, COALESCE(DEFAULT_VALUE, 0) as DEFAULT_VALUE FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP LIKE CONCAT(#{func_typ}, '%');
SELECT * TEST_API WHERE FUNC_TYP LIKE CONCAT(#{func_typ}, '%');

SELECT SUM(IFNULL(VALUE,0)*0.0167) as value FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_FORMAT(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AND TS < DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AND TAGNAME= #{tagname}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS <= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, INTERVAL 20 WEEK);
DELETE FROM TB_FP_VAL WHERE RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, INTERVAL 4 WEEK);
DELETE FROM TB_FR_VAL WHERE RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, INTERVAL 4 WEEK);
mapper.update: update TB_WPP_TAG_CODE set DEFAULT_VALUE = #{check_value} where FUNC_TYP = 'SyncStatus'
mapper.select: select TAG, VALUE from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP = 'SyncStatus'
select TAG, VALUE from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP = 'SyncStatus'

SELECT
1m as goalValue
2m as goalValue
3m as goalValue
4m as goalValue
5m as goalValue
6m as goalValue
7m as goalValue
8m as goalValue
9m as goalValue
10m as goalValue
11m as goalValue
12m as goalValue
1m, 2m, 3m, 4m, 5m, 6m, 7m, 8m, 9m, 10m, 11m, 12m
FROM TB_GOALSETTING WHERE TYPE = #{type} AND YEAR = #{year}
select TAG_GRP as PUMP_GRP, DEFAULT_VALUE as VALUE from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP='PumpStatus' order by TAG_GRP asc

INSERT INTO TB_AI_MODE_RST VALUES (#{RGSTR_TIME}, #{PUMP_GRP}, #{AI_MODE}, #{IS_WORK}, #{curPump}, #{prePump}, #{flow_ctr}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AI_MODE = #{AI_MODE}, IS_WORK = #{IS_WORK}, CUR_PUMP = #{curPump}, PRE_PUMP = #{prePump}, FLOW_CTR = #{flow_ctr}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(TS), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS <= #{nowDate} AND TS > DATE_SUB(#{nowDate}, interval 15 minute)
